Note · January 3, 2025

Writing Everyday #3.5

For me writing takes effort, and I believe in the importance of separating the work week from a weekend of rest. So, I will not be posting on Fridays and Saturdays.

Jake Ness

I am on a journey to learn about life. One day, I hope to gain understanding, to know for certain that I know nothing about life.
